payload:
# Office of Accountability — Implementation Prompt

## Objective

Build a civic knowledge platform for Argentine politics as an interactive graph explorer. The platform links politicians, votes, legislation, donors, promises, and user-contributed research into a single explorable, queryable system powered by Neo4j and deployed on Cloudflare Workers via Vinext.

## Stack

- **Frontend + API + SSR:** Vinext (App Router, Server Components, Route Handlers) → Cloudflare Workers
- **Database:** Ne... [truncated, 7860 chars total]
Start i18n:client-detect — update language-context.tsx to auto-detect browser language via navigator.language on mount when no defaultLang given
1.1 language-context.tsx: added detectBrowserLang(), LanguageProvider uses navigator.language when no defaultLang prop. SSR-safe. Typecheck clean. Commit 1880e58.
1.1 language-context.tsx: detectBrowserLang() is correct, SSR-safe, typecheck clean. No issues.
1.1 closed after review. Next: 1.2 root layout dynamic metadata with detectLang + SITE_META
1.2: Update webapp/src/app/layout.tsx — replace static metadata with async generateMetadata using detectLang(headers) + SITE_META, wrap body in LanguageProvider

1.2: Root layout now uses async generateMetadata with detectLang(headers) + SITE_META. Body wrapped in LanguageProvider with server-detected lang. html lang attr dynamic. Typecheck clean. Commit d4f2f55.
1.2: Root layout generateMetadata + LanguageProvider wiring verified. Typecheck clean, diff matches sub-task scope, no blocking issues.
1.2 review passed. Next: sub-task 1.3 — bilingual CASE_META in caso/[slug]/layout.tsx

Sub-task 1.3: Make CASE_META bilingual in webapp/src/app/caso/[slug]/layout.tsx. Import headers from next/headers and detectLang from @/lib/i18n. Restructure CASE_META so each case slug maps to { defaultLang: Lang, es: { title, description }, en: { title, description } }. Update generateMetadata to read Accept-Language via headers() + detectLang(), then pick meta[lang] (falling back to meta[case.defaultLang]). Keep LanguageProvider defaultLang logic as-is (uses case defaultLang, not detected lang). Typecheck must pass after.
1.3 complete: CASE_META bilingual in caso layout. Both caso-libra and caso-epstein have es+en metadata. generateMetadata reads Accept-Language via detectLang. Typecheck clean. Commit db3f895.

1.3 complete: CASE_META bilingual in caso layout. Both cases have es+en metadata. generateMetadata reads Accept-Language via detectLang with defaultLang fallback. Spanish accents correct. Typecheck independently verified clean. Sub-tasks 1.4, 1.5 remain.
1.3 done. Builder: pick up 1.4 — bilingual metadata for proximidad, simulacion, provincias pages. Then 1.5 typecheck.
Builder: implement 1.4 — convert static metadata to bilingual generateMetadata in proximidad, simulacion, provincias pages. See scratchpad for per-file specs. Then 1.5 typecheck.
1.4+1.5 complete: bilingual generateMetadata in proximidad, simulacion, provincias. Typecheck clean. Commit fece79c. All Step 1 sub-tasks done.
1.4+1.5 verified: bilingual generateMetadata in proximidad, simulacion, provincias. Typecheck clean. All Step 1 sub-tasks (1.1-1.5) complete — i18n browser detection + bilingual metadata fully wired.
i18n complete: browser lang detection (Accept-Language + navigator.language) + bilingual metadata in all 5 layouts/pages. Typecheck clean, build passes. 5 commits: 9cb5762..fece79c

## Reason
completed

## Status
All tasks completed successfully.

## Summary
- Iterations: 16
- Duration: 13m 17s
- Exit code: 0
